mapper.sql:
WHERE 1=1
AND (t.gen_type_id IS NULL OR t.gen_type_id IN #{item})
AND (t.transaction_type_id IS NULL OR t.transaction_type_id IN #{item})
AND (t.transaction_period_id IS NULL OR t.transaction_period_id IN #{item})
AND (t.contract_start_date IS NULL OR t.contract_start_date >= #{contractStartDate})
AND (t.contract_end_date IS NULL OR t.contract_end_date <= #{contractEndDate})
AND (t.is_green IS NULL OR t.is_green IN #{item})
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS companyId, c.name AS companyName,
t.transaction_type_id AS transactionTypeId, t.gen_type_id AS genTypeId, t.transaction_period_id AS transactionPeriodId, t.contract_start_date AS contractStartDate, t.contract_end_date AS contractEndDate, t.is_green AS isGreen,
t.chng_transaction_amount AS chngTransactionAmount, t.chng_avg_price AS chngTradedPrice
FROM companies c LEFT JOIN longterm_transactions t ON c.id = t.company_id LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON tt.id = t.transaction_type_id LEFT JOIN gen_types gt ON gt.id = t.gen_type_id LEFT JOIN transaction_periods tp ON tp.id = t.transaction_period_id

SELECT c.id AS companyId, c.name AS companyName,
t.gen_type_id AS genTypeId, t.transaction_type_id AS transactionTypeId, t.transaction_period_id AS transactionPeriodId, t.contract_start_date AS contractStartDate, t.contract_end_date AS contractEndDate, t.is_green AS isGreen,
COALESCE(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount), 0) AS chngTransactionAmount,
COALESCE( SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount * t.chng_avg_price) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount), 0), 0 ) AS chngTradedPrice
FROM companies c LEFT JOIN longterm_transactions t ON c.id = t.company_id LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON tt.id = t.transaction_type_id LEFT JOIN gen_types gt ON gt.id = t.gen_type_id LEFT JOIN transaction_periods tp ON tp.id = t.transaction_period_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY c.id

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0) AS totalTradedPower, COALESCE( SUM(t.base_price * t.chng_transaction_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0),0 ) AS weightedBenchmarkPrice, COALESCE( SUM(t.chng_avg_price * t.chng_transaction_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0),0 ) AS chngTradedPrice, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS companyCount FROM companies c LEFT JOIN longterm_transactions t ON c.id = t.company_id LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON tt.id = t.transaction_type_id LEFT JOIN gen_types gt ON gt.id = t.gen_type_id LEFT JOIN transaction_periods tp ON tp.id = t.transaction_period_id

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date,'%Y-%m') AS period, COALESCE(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0) AS tradedPower, COALESCE( SUM(t.base_price * t.chng_transaction_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0),0 ) AS weightedBenchmarkPrice, COALESCE( SUM(t.chng_avg_price * t.chng_transaction_amount) / NULLIF(SUM(t.chng_transaction_amount),0),0 ) AS chngTradedPrice FROM companies c LEFT JOIN longterm_transactions t ON c.id = t.company_id LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON tt.id = t.transaction_type_id LEFT JOIN gen_types gt ON gt.id = t.gen_type_id LEFT JOIN transaction_periods tp ON tp.id = t.transaction_period_id
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date,'%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(t.contract_start_date,'%Y-%m')
SELECT DISTINCT tt.name FROM longterm_transactions t LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON tt.id = t.transaction_type_id WHERE tt.name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tt.name
SELECT DISTINCT gt.name FROM longterm_transactions t LEFT JOIN gen_types gt ON gt.id = t.gen_type_id WHERE gt.name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY gt.name
SELECT DISTINCT tp.name FROM longterm_transactions t LEFT JOIN transaction_periods tp ON tp.id = t.transaction_period_id WHERE tp.name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tp.name
SELECT DISTINCT CAST(is_green AS CHAR) FROM longterm_transactions ORDER BY is_green
